name: stockyard-toxicfilter
description: Content moderation middleware for LLM responses. Block, redact, or flag harmful, hateful, or unsafe content before it reaches users.

tools.name: toxicfilter_stats
tools.description: Get moderation statistics: total scanned, blocks, flags, breakdown by category.

tools.name: toxicfilter_test
tools.description: Test a text string against moderation rules without sending to LLM.

tools.name: toxicfilter_categories
tools.description: List active moderation categories and their rules.

tools.name: toxicfilter_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the ToxicFilter proxy is running and healthy.
